Coordinator.//Url: Point at the real coordinator, not localhost, when deployed.
Coordinator.//EnrollmentSecret: Leave empty here. Set via a machine env var (Coordinator__EnrollmentSecret) or a machine-scoped secret store. Must match the coordinator's Auth:NodeEnrollmentSecret. Never commit a real secret.

Node.Name: windows-node
Node.//MaxConcurrency: Advisory cap reported to the coordinator. null = unbounded.
Node.//Labels: Free-form key/value pairs surfaced on the coordinator's node snapshot.
Node.//DataDirectory: Writable state (identity file). null = next to the exe. Set to C:\ProgramData\InferHub\Node when running under a least-privilege service account.

Models.//Include: Empty = advertise everything the backend reports.
Models.//Exclude: Names matched here are dropped from the report.
